g.text: A. O-ring 49108 suits backplate with O-ring groove 11670-20SP.
O-ring 45446 suits backplate with O-ring groove 11670-1 (up to serial number 03084).
C. Controller can be replaced with Torrium2.
** 72171 does not include a pressure vessel.
E. Casing changed as of serial number 12031. For casing repairs before that serial number new bolts will also be required.
